CRUCIBLE_SHOP.NoActor: You do not have an owned Hero character to shop with.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.DeleteShopConfirm: Delete this shop? This cannot be undone.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.CannotDeleteDefault: The default shop cannot be deleted.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.DropHint: Drag items here from the world, a compendium, or an actor sheet to add them to this shop.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SelectCustomFirst: Switch this shop to Custom Item List before adding items.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.DefaultModeHint: This shop draws its stock from the system's default Equipment compendiums - the same items available during Hero character creation.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SelectPlayersFirst: Select at least one player to whisper the invite to.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.AffordableOnlyHint: Only show items you can currently afford.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.NoAffordableItems: You cannot afford anything matching the current filters.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.SetCurrency: Click to set this actor's currency
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.RandomizeUnavailable: This version of Crucible does not expose an item randomizer.
CRUCIBLE_SHOP.RandomizeSuccess: Added {count} generated item(s) to the shop.
